hero_sub: Professional haircuts, colouring and styling for men and women

services.title: Precision Haircut
services.body: Our stylists shape hair to your face using scissor and clipper techniques for a clean, tailored finish

services.title: Custom Colour Service
services.body: We mix shades to match your skin tone, applying foil or balayage for lasting, natural-looking colour

services.title: Bridal Hair Styling
services.body: On your wedding day we create secure updos or loose waves that look elegant from ceremony to reception

about: Rush Hair Nottingham is a beauty salon based in Derby. It holds a 4.4-star rating from 548 Google reviews

faq.q: Do you serve clients outside Derby?
faq.a: We accept bookings from anyone who can contact us via email at irune.itoiz@rush.co.uk

faq.q: How can I book an appointment?
faq.a: Email irune.itoiz@rush.co.uk to schedule your visit

faq.q: What should I expect during my appointment?
faq.a: You will have a brief consultation followed by the requested hair or beauty service
